zh.Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Shirley於1419年之前出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉時，她的父親Sir Ralph Shirley27歲，母親Joan Basset29歲。她於1431年與John Brome在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃里克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年7月10日在英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Shirley was born before 1419, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Shirley, was 27 and her mother, Joan Basset, was 29. She married John Brome in 1431, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 July 1483, in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England, and was buried in St Michael's Church, Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Brome en 1431, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 juillet 1483, à Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à St Michael's Church, Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Shirleyが1419年以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルリーで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Shirleyは27歳，母Joan Bassetは29歳であった。1431年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックでJohn Bromeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年7月10日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー クリントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー クリントンスト ミチャエル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Michael's Church, Baddesley Clinton,: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Shirley(이)가 1419년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Shirley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Basset(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅에서 John Brome(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 7월 10일 영국 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.St Michael's Church, Baddesley Clinton,: ст мачаел'с чурч, баддесли клинтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Shirley родилась перед 1419 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Shirley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Basset, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Brome в 1431 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 июля 1483 г. в местности баддесли клинтон, варвиккшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел'с чурч, баддесли клинтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
